prompt: The vararg method has a compile error. What is the bug?
choices: vararg parameters cannot be combined with other types in the same method
Java allows at most one vararg parameter and it must be last; having two vararg parameters is a compile error
String... is not a valid vararg type; only primitive arrays can use ...
The method must be static to use vararg parameters
explanation: Java requires that a method have at most one vararg (variable-arity) parameter, and it must be the last parameter in the list. Declaring two vararg parameters (int... a, String... b) is a compile-time error. Fix: choose one vararg, or accept a String[] as an explicit array parameter.
